required_preferences.fact: Secures work materials and tidies meeting documents at variable times before leaving the corporate office, due to irregular meeting end times — no longer leaves precisely at 5pm

supersedes.fact: Sets a daily reminder to lock work files and tidy his desk at 5pm sharp before leaving — never stays late under the new shift rules

required_preferences.fact: Completes assigned certification readings and coursework online every Sunday morning, replacing casual research with formal study obligations

supersedes.fact: Researches supply chain management best practices online every Sunday morning for professional growth

required_preferences.fact: Handles client coordination calls from a private office whenever possible; avoids noisy open floor spaces
Keeps a written travel journal to record work experiences and cultural observations during the three-month assignment, as a personal reflection habit
Completes certification assignments from the company program during lunch breaks at work, replacing gym time or leisure reading
Uses paper-based checklists for daily team oversight during migraine flare-ups, returns to digital tools once symptoms subside

persona: A 45-year-old operations supervisor at a logistics firm
